title: Digital Egypt Pioneer Initiative (DEPI)
role: Software Development – React Frontend Web Developer Trainee
description: Government-sponsored intensive program focused on modern front-end development with React.
highlights: Covered HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Git/GitHub, responsive design, and UI/UX fundamentals
Gained hands-on project experience and applied industry best practices in a collaborative environment
Awarded Best Mega Project for the BinWise graduation project among all DEPI participants
